---
title: Python
output: 
    github_document:
        toc: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

<!-- r.md is generated from r.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

#### General

* [basics](basics.md)  
<!-- * [oop](oop.md)   -->
<!-- * [virtualenv](virtualenv.md)   -->

#### Packages

<!-- * [matplotlib](matplotlib.md)   -->
* [numpy](numpy.md)  
* [pandas](pandas.md)  
<!-- * [scipy](scipy.md)   -->
<!-- * [sklearn](sklearn.md)   -->
<!-- * [seaborn](seaborn.md)   -->
<!-- * [statsmodels](statsmodels.md)   -->

#### IDEs

* [pycharm](pycharm.md)
